title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.160 - Renewals of licenses, requirements
text:
190.160.  Renewals of licenses, requirements. — The renewal of any license shall require conformance with sections 190.001 to 190.245 and sections 190.525 to 190.537, and rules adopted by the department pursuant to sections 190.001 to 190.245 and sections 190.525 to 190.537.
(L. 1973 S.B. 57 § 13, A.L. 1998 S.B. 743, A.L. 2002 S.B. 1107)
